g.text: Navigation history — Alt+← (Back) ⟶ body swap (Command replay)
History is a Command stack: each visited path is a
reified entry. Back/forward just move :idx; the stack
itself is unchanged (no re-navigation side effects).
Back/forward never re-read the file or re-render Markdown:
the target doc is already a :doc entity in DataScript, so
switching is a pure index move + a sub recompute. Forward
(Alt+→) is the mirror: idx < count-1 → (inc idx).
